headline: Stryker completes acquisition of Amplitude Vascular Systems to add next-generation IVL technology to peripheral vascular portfolio

headline: Stryker declares an $0.88 per share quarterly dividend
summary: Portage, Michigan, May 07, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Stryker (NYSE:SYK) announced that its Board of Directors has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.88 per share payable July 31, 2026, to shareholders of record at the close of business on June 30, 2026, representing an increase of 4.8% versus the prior year and unchanged from the previous quarter.
